PF2E_FLYING_VISUAL_HELPER.Settings.enabl: Enable the client-side PF2e flight visuals and local tactical airspace view.
Add an Airspace Explorer button to Token controls. The side panel remains closed until clicked and closes on every Scene change.
Mark Foundry's actual Token footprint with a non-interactive landing ring that strengthens on hover or selection.
Compatibility value retained from 0.5.x; the 0.6 airspace view always includes its own elevation axis.
Render a concentric transparent flight-plate rim, refractive highlights, and the camera-aligned support point.
Render the Token texture as a strong, footprint-bounded shadow directly below its original grid position.
PF2E_FLYING_VISUAL_HELPER.Settings.stand: Adjust the top-down acrylic rim, support point, and interaction X-ray opacity.
PF2E_FLYING_VISUAL_HELPER.Settings.shado: Adjust the maximum opacity of the grounded Token silhouette.
PF2E_FLYING_VISUAL_HELPER.Settings.proje: Adjust the original-footprint landing ring and interaction reticle opacity.
PF2E_FLYING_VISUAL_HELPER.Settings.shado: Compatibility value retained from 0.5.x; 0.6 shadows remain centered on the original footprint.
PF2E_FLYING_VISUAL_HELPER.Airspace.title: 3D Airspace
PF2E_FLYING_VISUAL_HELPER.Airspace.selec: Select a visible Token, then open its nearby 3D airspace.
